## A. PolicyDenial constructors

- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/agent_loop.rs`: constructs and emits `LoopAuditEvent::PolicyDenial { ts, run_id, session_id, iteration, tool_name, reason }` when the policy layer denies a tool call during the agent loop (line 273)

The other appearances are **not** constructors:
- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/audit/mod.rs` — enum variant *definition*
- `crates/orbit-engine/examples/v2_runtime_smoke.rs` — pattern-match to read fields
- `crates/orbit-agent/examples/tool_allowlist.rs` — pattern-match to read `tool_name`

## B. AuditSink implementors

- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/audit/mod.rs`: `NullSink`
- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/audit/mod.rs`: `InMemorySink`
- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/audit/mod.rs`: `JsonlFileSink`
- `crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/tool_enforcement.rs`: `EnforcedAuditSink`
